prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic desktop wallpaper, 16:10 aspect ratio. A vast expanse of deep space rendered in near-total darkness. The base color is pure black (#080808). From the center-left of the frame, a massive circular portal or gateway opens into another dimension — its edge defined by impossibly thin gold wireframe sacred geometry: nested Metatron's Cube dissolving into a Flower of Life pattern, glowing with a warm antiqued gold (#C9A84C) light, casting no ambient spill. Through the portal, a parallel cosmos is visible — inverted star fields, impossible architecture of light, fractal corridors receding to infinity in deep violet (#2A0A3A) and midnight indigo. The main space around the portal contains a sparse star field — not a galaxy, just isolated pinpoints of white and pale gold light, some with subtle 6-point diffraction spikes as if shot through a real telescope. A faint nebula cloud drifts in the upper right quadrant — extremely subtle, nearly invisible, in dark plum (#1A0A20) and burnt umber, with the faintest threads of gold dust caught in starlight. Cosmic dust particles float in the foreground, slightly out of focus, suggesting depth. The entire composition feels like looking through the viewport of a spacecraft at something ancient and incomprehensible. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-400c with a 24mm f/3.5 lens, ISO 100, long exposure 30 seconds, capturing maximum dynamic range in the blacks. No lens flare. No bloom. No text. No watermarks. The mood is silent, reverent, expensive — like a collector's print you'd find in a penthouse. Do not add any bright colors, neon effects, or sci-fi cliches. Do not add planets, astronauts, or spaceships. The portal is the only structural element. Everything else is void, stars, and dust.
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, bright colors, neon, sci-fi cliche, planets, astronauts, spaceships, lens flare, bloom, glow effects, cartoon, illustration, digital art, CGI, 3D render, video game, anime, fantasy art, oversaturation, chromatic aberration, noise grain, compression artifacts, low resolution, blurry, out of focus subject, stock photo, generic space wallpaper, NASA photo, blue dominant, teal and orange color grade, light leak, bokeh balls, emoji, smiley face
